arts.ttl: Arsenal women on verge of Champions League exit after frustrating loss to Hacken
arts.sum: Hacken 1-0 Arsenal: Tabitha Tindell scored the only goal to leave the Gunners with work to do in the second leg

arts.ttl: Everything has been leading to this – Jonas Eidevall ready for big week
arts.sum: Arsenal face Hacken with a place in the Women’s Champions League on the line then begin their WSL campaign against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Vivianne Miedema, Lucy Bronze and five new WSL signings to watch this season
arts.sum: Miedema has swapped Arsenal for Manchester City, while Bronze returns to the WSL at Chelsea
